title: Create a particle filter — dust_filter_create
text: Create particle filter object

title: Create a particle filter — dust_filter_create
code: dust_filter_create(   generator,   pars,   time_start,   time,   data,   n_particles,   n_groups = 0,   dt = 1,   index = NULL,   seed = NULL )

title: Create a particle filter — dust_filter_create
text: generator model generator object, class dust_model_generator.  model must support compare_data used function. pars Initial parameters model.  full set parameters; running filter may update subsets using model's underlying update_pars method. time_start start time simulation - typically first data point.  Must integer-like value. time vector times, corresponding entry data.  model stop times compute likelihood using compare function. data data compare .  must list length time, element corresponds data required model.  model ungrouped element data list elements corresponding whatever model requires.  model grouped, list many elements model groups, element corresponding data model requires. likely introduce friendlier data.frame based input soon. n_particles number particles run.  Larger numbers give lower variance likelihood estimate run slowly. n_groups Optionally, number parameter groups dt time step model, defaults 1 index optional index states extract.  given, subset model state return.  can use return fewer model states model ran , reorder states, name exit (names present index copied rownames returned array). seed Optionally, seed.  Otherwise respond R's RNG seed initialisation.

title: Create a particle filter — dust_filter_create
text: dust_unfilter object, can used dust_unfilter_run

title: Fetch last filter history — dust_filter_last_history
text: Fetch last history created running filter.  errors last call dust_filter_run use save_history = TRUE.

title: Get filter RNG state — dust_filter_rng_state
text: filter dust_filter object, created dust_filter_create

title: Get filter RNG state — dust_filter_rng_state
text: raw vector, quite long.  Later describe might reseed filter model state.

title: Run particle filter — dust_filter_run
text: Run particle filter

title: Run particle filter — dust_filter_run
code: dust_filter_run(filter, pars = NULL, initial = NULL, save_history = FALSE)

title: Run particle filter — dust_filter_run
text: filter dust_filter object, created dust_filter_create pars Optional parameters run filter .  provided, parameters updated initial Optional initial conditions, matrix (state x particle) 3d array (state x particle x group).  provided, model initial conditions used. save_history Logical, indicating simulation history saved simulation runs; small overhead runtime memory.  History (particle trajectories) saved time filter.  filter constructed using non-NULL index parameter, history restricted states.

title: Run particle filter — dust_filter_run
text: vector likelihood values, many elements groups.

what: Compare model state against data — dust_model_compare_data
title: Compare model state against data — dust_model_compare_data
text: Compare current model state data.  supported models 'compare_data' support (.e., model definition includes compare_data method).  current state model (dust_model_state) compared data provided data.

title: Compare model state against data — dust_model_compare_data
Compare model state against data — dust_model_compare_data
text: model dust_model object data data compare . model ungrouped data list elements corresponding whatever model requires.  model grouped, list many elements model groups, element corresponding data model requires.

title: Compare model state against data — dust_model_compare_data
text: numeric vector many elements model groups, corresponding log-likelihood data group.

title: Create a dust object — dust_model_create
text: Create dust object model generator.  allocates model sets initial set parameters.  created can use dust functions interact .

title: Create a dust object — dust_model_create
code: dust_model_create(   generator,   pars,   n_particles,   n_groups = 0,   time = 0,   dt = 1,   seed = NULL,   deterministic = FALSE )

title: Create a dust object — dust_model_create
text: generator model generator object, class dust_model_generator pars list parameters.  format depend model.  n_groups 1 , must list length n_groups element list parameters model. n_particles number particles create. n_groups Optionally, number parameter groups time initial time, defaults 0 dt time step model, defaults 1 seed Optionally, seed.  Otherwise respond R's RNG seed initialisation. deterministic Logical, indicating model allocated deterministic mode.

title: Create a dust object — dust_model_create
text: dust_model object, opaque format.

title: Reorder states — dust_model_reorder
text: Reorder states within model.  function primarily used debugging may removed interface generally useful.

title: Reorder states — dust_model_reorder
text: model dust_model object index parameter ordering.  ungrouped model vector element parameter index (element j reordering ith particle state previously used j).  elements must lie [1, n_particles], repetition index allowed (many new particles may state one old particle). model grouped, index must matrix n_particles rows n_groups columns, column corresponding reordering group.

title: Reorder states — dust_model_reorder
text: Nothing, called side effects .

title: Set model state — dust_model_set_state

title: Simulate model — dust_model_simulate
text: Simulate model series times, returning array output.  output can quite large, may filter states according index.

title: Simulate model — dust_model_simulate
text: model dust_model object times vector times.  must increasing, first time must less current model time (reported dust_model_time) index optional index states extract.  given, subset model state return.  can use return fewer model states model ran , reorder states, name exit (names present index copied rownames returned array).

title: Simulate model — dust_model_simulate
text: array 3 dimensions (state x particle x time) 4 dimensions (state x particle x group x time) grouped model.

title: Create an unfilter — dust_unfilter_create
text: Create "unfilter" object, can used compute deterministic likelihood following algorithm particle filter, limited single particle.  name method change future.

title: Create an unfilter — dust_unfilter_create
code: dust_unfilter_create(   generator,   pars,   time_start,   time,   data,   n_particles = 1,   n_groups = 0,   dt = 1,   index = NULL )

title: Create an unfilter — dust_unfilter_create
text: generator model generator object, class dust_model_generator.  model must support compare_data used function. pars Initial parameters model.  full set parameters; running filter may update subsets using model's underlying update_pars method. time_start start time simulation - typically first data point.  Must integer-like value. time vector times, corresponding entry data.  model stop times compute likelihood using compare function. data data compare .  must list length time, element corresponds data required model.  model ungrouped element data list elements corresponding whatever model requires.  model grouped, list many elements model groups, element corresponding data model requires. likely introduce friendlier data.frame based input soon. n_particles number particles run.  Typically 1, can run 1 want - currently produce likelihood provide different initial conditions see different likelihoods. n_groups Optionally, number parameter groups dt time step model, defaults 1 index optional index states extract.  given, subset model state return.  can use return fewer model states model ran , reorder states, name exit (names present index copied rownames returned array).

title: Create an unfilter — dust_unfilter_create
text: dust_unfilter object, can used dust_unfilter_run

title: Fetch last unfilter history — dust_unfilter_last_history
text: Fetch last history created running unfilter.  errors last call dust_unfilter_run use save_history = TRUE.

text: unfilter dust_unfilter object, created dust_unfilter_create

title: Fetch last unfilter history — dust_unfilter_last_history
text: array

title: Run unfilter — dust_unfilter_run
text: unfilter dust_unfilter object, created dust_unfilter_create pars Optional parameters run filter .  provided, parameters updated initial Optional initial conditions, matrix (state x particle) 3d array (state x particle x group).  provided, model initial conditions used. save_history Logical, indicating simulation history saved simulation runs; small overhead runtime memory.  History (particle trajectories) saved time filter.  filter constructed using non-NULL index parameter, history restricted states.

title: Run unfilter — dust_unfilter_run
text: vector likelihood values, many elements groups.
